title: c11 Mailbox Envelope v1
description: Source of truth for the c11 inter-agent mailbox envelope (v1). Every envelope written to $C11_STATE/workspaces/<ws>/mailboxes/_outbox/*.msg must validate against this schema. See docs/c11-messaging-primitive-design.md §3.

version.description: Schema version. Integer, not a string. Bumps are breaking.

id.description: ULID: Crockford base32, 26 chars (no I, L, O, U).

from.description: Sender surface handle (surface name set via c11 set-title / nameable-panes).

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp with Z suffix (sender-attested; NOT an ordering field).

body.description: UTF-8 body. Schema enforces chars; Swift validator enforces bytes. Must be empty string when body_ref is set.

to.description: Recipient surface handle. At least one of to or topic is required.

topic.description: Dotted topic token published by senders. No globs on publish (globs are for subscribers).

reply_to.description: Surface handle the reply should be addressed to.

in_reply_to.description: ULID of the envelope this is a reply to.

urgent.description: Sender hint. Handlers may honor or ignore.

ttl_seconds.description: Advisory expiry in seconds from ts. Recipients may drop expired envelopes on read.

body_ref.description: Absolute path to an external body payload. When set, body must be empty.

content_type.description: MIME type hint for body or body_ref contents.

ext.description: Forward-compat escape hatch. Any keys allowed under ext.
